mapper.select: SELECT u.id AS userId, u.username AS userName, CASE u.role WHEN 1 THEN 'ADMIN' WHEN 2 THEN 'STUDENT' WHEN 3 THEN 'TEACHER' WHEN 4 THEN 'ENTERPRISE' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS userRole, COALESCE(ol.operation_count, 0) AS operationCount, ol.last_operation_time AS lastOperationTime, CAST(COALESCE(u.status, 1) AS SIGNED) AS status FROM education_user_db.users u LEFT JOIN ( SELECT user_id, COUNT(1) AS operation_count, MAX(created_time) AS last_operation_time FROM operation_log WHERE user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY user_id ) ol ON ol.user_id = u.id WHERE u.id = #{userId}
SELECT * FROM operation_log WHERE operation_type IN ('BLOCKCHAIN_ANCHOR', 'BLOCKCHAIN_ANCHOR_BATCH') AND status = 1 ORDER BY created_time DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT COALESCE(pool.total_connections, 0) AS totalConnections, COALESCE(pool.active_connections, 0) AS activeConnections, CASE WHEN COALESCE(pool.total_connections, 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(pool.active_connections / pool.total_connections, 4) END AS connectionUsageRate, COALESCE(logStat.slow_query_count, 0) AS slowQueryCount, COALESCE(logStat.avg_query_time_ms, 0) AS avgQueryTimeMs FROM ( SELECT SUM(COALESCE(latest.thread_count, 0)) AS total_connections, SUM(CASE WHEN latest.status = 'UP' THEN COALESCE(latest.thread_count, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS active_connections FROM ( SELECT sm.* FROM system_monitor sm INNER JOIN ( SELECT service_name, MAX(report_time) AS max_report_time FROM system_monitor GROUP BY service_name ) t ON t.service_name = sm.service_name AND t.max_report_time = sm.report_time ) latest ) pool CROSS JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN IFNULL(execute_time, 0) >= #{slowThresholdMs} THEN 1 END) AS slow_query_count, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN IFNULL(execute_time, 0) >= #{slowThresholdMs} THEN execute_time END), 2) AS avg_query_time_ms FROM operation_log WHERE created_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) ) logStat

SELECT COUNT(1) AS totalCalls, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS errorCalls, ROUND(COUNT(1) / GREATEST(TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, #{startTime}, NOW()), 1), 4) AS qps, ROUND(AVG(IFNULL(execute_time, 0)), 2) AS avgResponseTime FROM operation_log WHERE created_time >= #{startTime}

SELECT request_url AS apiPath, UPPER(IFNULL(request_method, 'UNKNOWN')) AS method, COUNT(1) AS totalCalls, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS errorCalls, ROUND(AVG(IFNULL(execute_time, 0)), 2) AS avgResponseTime, ROUND(MAX(IFNULL(execute_time, 0)), 2) AS p95ResponseTime, MAX(created_time) AS reportTime FROM operation_log
request_url IS NOT NULL AND request_url != ''
AND ( request_url LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR request_method LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
GROUP BY request_url, UPPER(IFNULL(request_method, 'UNKNOWN')) ORDER BY totalCalls DESC, reportTime DESC

SELECT 'ALL' AS apiPath, 'ALL' AS method, t.total_calls AS totalCalls, t.error_calls AS errorCalls, t.avg_response_time AS avgResponseTime, t.p95_response_time AS p95ResponseTime, t.report_time AS reportTime FROM ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(created_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:00') AS bucket_time, COUNT(1) AS total_calls, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS error_calls, ROUND(AVG(IFNULL(execute_time, 0)), 2) AS avg_response_time, ROUND(MAX(IFNULL(execute_time, 0)), 2) AS p95_response_time, MAX(created_time) AS report_time FROM operation_log GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(created_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:00') ORDER BY bucket_time DESC LIMIT #{limitSize} ) t ORDER BY t.report_time DESC
